user_report.issue: Binary toggles are currently rendered as rounded rectangle pills filled with blue when checked.
user_report.requested_change: Use raw checkbox-style controls for these binary settings because the current switch styling is unintuitive.

screenshot.description: Tall crop showing multiple blue and gray pill switches without surrounding labels.

local_verification.shared_component_finding: Toggle renders input type="checkbox" with className="yd-switch".
local_verification.style_finding: .yd-switch applies rounded-full pill styling with checked blue fill; .yd-check already exists as a square checkbox style.

plan_change: Track as M25-DOGFOOD-07. The implementation should make binary dogfood settings render as plain checkbox controls, update/retire yd-switch where appropriate, keep semantic input type="checkbox", and capture browser evidence that checked/unchecked states remain clear.
